title: baccharis viscosa
intro: Baccharis viscosa, also known as sticky groundsel or sticky baccharis, is a shrub-like plant species native to South America and the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Baccharis viscosa include reducing inflammation and pain, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
